title: Good Vibes, Good Life
author: Vex King
subline: How self-love is the key to unlocking your greatness.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A wave — a single sine curve undulating horizontally. The peaks are red, the troughs are ash. A frequency counter label marks the wavelength. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1500)" fill="none">
    <path d="M -100 0 Q 100 -200 300 0 T 700 0 T 1100 0 T 1500 0 T 1900 0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M -100 0 Q 100 -200 300 0 T 700 0 T 1100 0 T 1500 0 T 1900 0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="200 400">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="0" to="-600" dur="6s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </path>
    <!-- The wave is one big horizontal line. Add a thicker solid red top stroke on the peaks. -->
    <path d="M -100 -100 Q 100 -200 300 -100 Q 500 0 700 -100 Q 900 -200 1100 -100 Q 1300 0 1500 -100 Q 1700 -200 1900 -100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- Pulse label -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" letter-spacing="0.2em" font-size="13">
      <line x1="200" y1="180" x2="600" y2="180" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="170" x2="200" y2="190" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="600" y1="170" x2="600" y2="190" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="400" y="210" text-anchor="middle" fill="#cccccc" font-weight="500">ONE WAVE</text>
    </g>
    <text x="800" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">VIBRATION · FREQUENCY · ENERGY</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A single long horizontal sine wave runs across the lower 2/3 — the visual definition of a 'vibe.' A second offset wave in red dashes suggests the amplitude/energy overlay. No fancy 3D, no gradients — just a flat line that pulses. The metaphor is exact: vibes are waves, your life is the signal.
